title: LightSaberSwords
description:
LightSaber Resource Pack ! on Swords !
Like Star Wars Style.
body:
# LightSaberModel on all Swords !
![Saber](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fad92bdb626b52b2044aff9d297715f9b953699c.png)
![Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2e90fd0b920822b3b8c1be1e1b7bf939008af77.gif)
## Color :
White = Wooden

Purple = Stone

Green = Iron

Yellow = Gold

Blue = Diamond

Red = Netherite

**Thanks for downloading !**
